case_title: JOHN KIDDER RESPONDENT VS. LUIS CAMACHO APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT CAMACHO, LUIS AS TO RESPONDENT KIDDER, JOHN HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
ORDER AND STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM CAL. COINST. ART. VI SUBSECTION 21. SIGNED BY JOHN KIDDLER AND LUIS CAMACHO.
MINUTES FOR DEC-17-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT KIDDER, JOHN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CAMACHO, LUIS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2003 - JUDGMENT RENDERED IN FAVOR OF JOHN KIDDER AND AGAINST LUIS CAMACHO FOR $5000.00 AND FOR COST OF $22.00. RICHARD HORNING, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK; NOT REPORTED.
